chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-2215 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.10718/2023 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 17.09.2025 Ms. Wajiha Maryam Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General ------------------------------------ This is an old case of 2023, which is over 2 1⁄2 years ago. It was last taken up on 29.03.2024, which is over 1 1⁄2 years ago, when a counsel for respondents filed comments on behalf of respondents 2 and 3. Despite lapse of 1 1⁄2 years, learned counsel for petitioner has failed in pursuing this old petition, diligently. Once again, despite lapse of 1 1⁄2 years learned counsel for petitioner is called absent, without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is hereby dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
